title: The Boy Who Flew Too Close
summary: Courage can lift you, but without boundaries, even bold ambition can break.
content: They say he fell because he was reckless, but that isn't the full story.
He spent his life watching the sky from the ground, listening to warnings and memorizing limits.
When the wings were finally fastened to his shoulders, he didn't see danger. He saw possibility.
At first, he flew carefully. He tested the wind and kept his father's voice in his head.
Then the sky opened wider than he imagined. The higher he rose, the lighter everything felt.
For the first time, he wasn't escaping. He was ascending.
In that moment, caution started to feel like doubt.
He didn't fly toward the sun because he was foolish. He flew because he believed he could.
The wax softened. The feathers loosened. Gravity reminded him that ambition without boundaries has weight.
But here is what most people forget: he flew.
lesson: Bold action matters, but wise limits keep your progress sustainable.
actionStep: Choose one goal you’re excited about. Now write down one boundary that will keep you disciplined while pursuing it.
